name: Rabbit Hoggan
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Rabbit meat, chopped into small pieces (The rabbit must be young and fresh)
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the pastry using 1 lb plain flour, 6 oz lard, salt, and 1 drop lemon juice. Roll out to a round.
2. Cut the rabbit meat into small pieces (the rabbit must be young and fresh).
3. Chop the vegetables: 6 small potatoes, 2 carrots, 2 small turnips, and 2 onions.
4. Combine the vegetables and chopped rabbit meat in the center of the pastry circle.
5. Season with a little stock and seal the edges of the pastry.
6. Crimp the edges and brush with milk.
7. Place on a baking tray and bake for about 1-1 1/2 hours in a moderate oven, or until fully cooked (the contents may be slightly longer if undercooked).
8. This recipe yields one large hoggan or six smaller ones.
Note: Ensure the rabbit is young and fresh before using it in the dish.
